evidence.title: SCCK.vn mechanical marketplace growth and operational product work
evidence.problem: Industrial buyers and sellers needed a marketplace that could handle trust, category complexity, seller enablement, and practical purchase workflows rather than a superficial consumer-style storefront.
actions: Led cross-functional product delivery across operations, engineering, and product design
Helped shape features around marketplace trust, seller onboarding, category complexity, COD expectations, and real buyer behavior
Built AI-assisted support through a Botpress and OpenAI chatbot for FAQs and price lookup
results: Positioned the platform as a more complete mechanical-industry marketplace
Built operationally grounded product thinking in a complex B2B environment
Demonstrated ability to connect product decisions with supply-side and buyer-side execution

fit_for_roles.product_manager: Strong proof for B2B product strategy, operational tradeoffs, and market-facing delivery.
fit_for_roles.product_owner: Strong proof for backlog shaping and execution in a multi-stakeholder environment.
fit_for_roles.business_analyst: Useful for workflow and requirement framing in a domain with messy real-world constraints.
fit_for_roles.ai_product_ops: Useful for AI-enabled support workflows grounded in business operations.

evidence.title: Healthcare workflow redesign and OCR productivity improvement
evidence.problem: Clinical teams were losing time in document-heavy workflows that required better usability, stronger process design, and compliance-aware digitization.
actions: Mapped pain points in patient-care and clinical workflows with stakeholders
Co-developed HIPAA and GDPR roadmap considerations with the team
Shipped an OCR note-reading feature with workflow impact in mind rather than as a standalone technical novelty
results: Reduced compliance incidents by 30 percent through roadmap work
Helped support a 2 million USD UK project

fit_for_roles.product_manager: Strong proof for outcome-focused product work in compliance-heavy environments.
fit_for_roles.product_owner: Strong proof for translating workflow pain into deliverable product increments.
fit_for_roles.business_analyst: Strong proof for process mapping, user pain analysis, and acceptance-focused thinking.
fit_for_roles.ai_product_ops: Strong proof for automation that improves real operations with measurable results.

evidence.title: Private markets onboarding in a regulated environment
evidence.problem: Private-capital clients needed smoother investor onboarding while still meeting legal, signing, and audit expectations.
actions: Coordinated product requirements with legal stakeholders and signature vendors such as GlobalSign and DocuSign
Improved onboarding and digital-signing flows in a regulated environment
Migrated work management from Airtable to Jira so requests could be tracked and prioritized more effectively
results: Supported a 40 percent increase in secure signing adoption
Enabled the team to track and prioritize roughly three times more requests
Maintained an average NPS of 75 in 2022 by addressing key drivers with Customer Success and Data teams

fit_for_roles.product_manager: Strong proof for regulated-product delivery, vendor coordination, and stakeholder management.
fit_for_roles.product_owner: Useful for execution detail, risk management, and workflow improvement.
fit_for_roles.business_analyst: Strong proof for requirement translation across product, legal, and vendor constraints.
fit_for_roles.ai_product_ops: Indirectly useful for trust, control, and process-heavy digital workflows.

evidence.title: Super-app and gamification delivery at Kyanon Digital
evidence.problem: The client needed a backlog owner who could move from kickoff to launch while keeping multiple stakeholders aligned around user-visible outcomes.
actions: Led delivery planning for AEON Vietnam digital products including AEON Kids Version 2 and the iAEON super-app initiative
Coordinated design, engineering, QC, and business stakeholders through rollout and delivery
Contributed to the presentation and solution framing that helped win the AEON super-app engagement and standardized Jira, Confluence, and OKR templates
results: Delivered user-facing gamification features including Lucky Wheel, daily check-in, and progress bar flows
Improved alignment and visibility for the wider team
Added management and coaching proof on top of execution ownership

fit_for_roles.product_manager: Useful for roadmap ownership and stakeholder alignment.
fit_for_roles.product_owner: Strong proof for backlog ownership and shipping cadence.
fit_for_roles.business_analyst: Useful for mentoring and requirement quality discipline.
fit_for_roles.ai_product_ops: Lower relevance unless the target role values delivery systems and process scale.

evidence.title: Business analysis foundation at NashTech
evidence.problem: Multi-industry clients needed clear requirements, workflows, and alignment artifacts before development could move with confidence.
actions: Authored user stories, acceptance criteria, process diagrams, and workflow documents
Supported delivery of the Fitness First self-service app suite
Worked through requirement detail that replaced legacy operational flows
results: Helped clients save roughly 500 thousand USD per year through modernized self-service workflows
Built a durable foundation in requirement quality and documentation discipline

fit_for_roles.product_manager: Supportive evidence for delivery discipline, not the main strategic proof.
fit_for_roles.ai_product_ops: Useful only where operational process design matters.

evidence.title: Germany motivation grounded in study, systems, and integration
evidence.problem: A Germany application needs credible long-term motivation rather than generic relocation language.
actions: Connected Germany motivation to double-degree study path, software engineering learning, and preference for structured operating environments
Framed relocation intent around contribution, integration, and systems-oriented work rather than lifestyle rhetoric
results: Provides a credible motivation narrative for cover letters aimed at German employers

fit_for_roles.product_manager: Useful for explaining long-term move and cultural fit.
fit_for_roles.business_analyst: Useful for formal applications needing stability and clarity.
fit_for_roles.ai_product_ops: Useful for Germany-oriented tech and operations applications.
